title: urochloa lata var. pubescens
intro: Urochloa lata var. pubescens, commonly known as the hairy signal grass, is a type of grass native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and relieving respiratory issues. Urochloa lata var. pubescens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use.
